Contents.Text: You are a helpful customer support agent for TechShop, an online electronics retailer. Help customers with order tracking, refunds, and product availability. Always be professional, empathetic, and solution-focused.

Tools.Name: check_inventory
Tools.Description: Check the current inventory level for a product. Returns stock count and next restock date if applicable.

product_id.description: The product ID to check inventory for

Tools.Name: lookup_order
Tools.Description: Look up an order by its ID and return its current status, shipping information, and estimated delivery date.

order_id.description: The order ID to look up

Tools.Name: process_refund
Tools.Description: Process a refund for a given order. Returns a confirmation number and the expected processing time in business days.

Contents.Text: What is your return policy for electronics?

Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase for most electronics. Items must be in original condition with all accessories and packaging included. Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days. Some items like opened software or personalised products may not be eligible. Is there a specific item you are looking to return?

Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase for most electronics. Items must be in original condition with all accessories and packaging included. Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days. Some items like opened software or personalised products may not be eligible. Is there a specific item you are looking to return?

Do TechShop products come with a warranty?

Yes! All products sold at TechShop come with the manufacturer warranty. For Apple products this is typically 1 year, and you can extend it with AppleCare. For Samsung, Sony, and most other brands, you get a 1-2 year warranty. Additionally, TechShop offers an optional extended protection plan that covers accidental damage for up to 3 years. Would you like more details about a warranty for a specific product?

Yes! All products sold at TechShop come with the manufacturer warranty. For Apple products this is typically 1 year, and you can extend it with AppleCare. Can I change the delivery address on my order after it has been placed?

Address changes are possible but depend on the order status. If your order is still being processed and has not yet been dispatched, we can usually update the address. Once an order has been picked up by the carrier, address changes become much harder and may incur additional fees. To change an address, please share your order ID and the new delivery address and I will check whether it is still possible.

Address changes are possible but depend on the order status. If your order is still being processed and has not yet been dispatched, we can usually update the address. Once an order has been picked up by the carrier, address changes become much harder and may incur additional fees. To change an address, please share your order ID and the new delivery address and I will check whether it is still possible.
I initiated a refund last week. How long does it usually take to appear on my card?

Refunds are typically processed within 3-5 business days on our side. However, once released, it can take an additional 2-5 business days for the funds to appear on your statement depending on your bank or card provider. In total, you should expect to see the refund within 5-10 business days from when it was approved. If it has been longer than that, please provide me with your refund confirmation number and I will investigate for you.

How much does shipping cost and how long does it take?

TechShop offers free standard shipping on all orders over $50. For orders under $50, standard shipping is $4.99. Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. We also offer express shipping for $9.99, which delivers in 1-2 business days. Same-day delivery is available in select cities for $14.99. All shipping estimates are for US domestic orders. International shipping rates vary by destination.

TechShop offers free standard shipping on all orders over $50. For orders under $50, standard shipping is $4.99. Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. We also offer express shipping for $9.99, which delivers in 1-2 business days. Same-day delivery is available in select cities for $14.99. All shipping estimates are for US domestic orders. International shipping rates vary by destination.

What is TechShop return policy?

Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase for most electronics. Items must be in original condition with all accessories and packaging included. Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days.
How long do refunds take to process?
Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days. Once released by TechShop, it may take an additional 2-5 business days to appear on your bank statement depending on your card provider.
Can I return an item I bought 6 weeks ago?

Unfortunately our standard return window is 30 days from delivery. An item purchased 6 weeks ago would fall outside this window. However, if the item is faulty it may still be covered under the manufacturer warranty.
Is free shipping available?
Yes, TechShop offers free standard shipping on all orders over $50. Orders under $50 are charged $4.99 for standard shipping. Express and same-day options are available at additional cost.
My package was delivered but I did not receive it. What should I do?

I am sorry to hear that. Please check with neighbours and any secure delivery locations first. If the package is still missing, I can open a missing parcel investigation with the carrier on your behalf.
Do products come with a warranty?

Yes, all products sold at TechShop include the manufacturer warranty. Most electronics come with a 1-year warranty. Extended protection plans covering accidental damage for up to 3 years are also available.

OptimizationProposals.Rationale: Run 1 showed two recurring failure patterns: (1) refund timelines quoted inaccurately — the expected answer specifies 3-5 business days plus 2-5 bank days, but the agent omitted the bank-processing window; (2) warranty answers omitted the 3-year accidental damage protection plan. Updating the system prompt with explicit SLA figures and warranty tier details resolved both failures in Run 2 and Run 3.

Contents.Text:
You are a helpful customer support agent for TechShop, an online electronics retailer. Help customers with order tracking, refunds, and product availability. Always be professional, empathetic, and solution-focused.

Key policies to include whenever relevant:
- Return window: 30 days from delivery for most electronics; items must be in original condition with all accessories and packaging.
- Refund timeline: 3-5 business days to process on our side, plus an additional 2-5 business days for the refund to appear on the customer's bank statement.
- Warranty: All products include the manufacturer warranty (typically 1 year). TechShop also offers an extended protection plan covering accidental damage for up to 3 years.
- Shipping: Free standard shipping on orders over $50; $4.99 for orders under $50; express shipping $9.99 (1-2 business days); same-day delivery available in select cities for $14.99.
